seo.title: Real Estate Agent Review Software | ReviewFlo
seo.description: Get more Google reviews for your real estate business. Route upset clients to private feedback first. Free forever, no credit card required.

h1: Review Management for Real Estate Agents

hero.heading: Review Management Built for Real Estate Agents
hero.subheading: Closing day is busy. ReviewFlo asks after keys change hands while gratitude still runs high.

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every Agent Faces

items.heading: Closings end in a blur of signatures
items.body: Clients rush to movers, not Google.

items.heading: Deals that die become public blame
items.body: Financing falls through and stars fall with them.

items.heading: You cannot share most success stories
items.body: Privacy limits what you can showcase.

howItWorks.sectionHeading: How ReviewFlo Works for Real Estate Agents

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after the visit
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link right after the appointment or job.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they send feedback to you privately.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star clients go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

items.heading: Send after closing
items.body: Catch buyers and sellers when the stress lifts.

items.heading: Private first for commission or inspection fights
$270/month cheaper than Podium
items.body: Podium is $289/month. ReviewFlo Pro is $19/month, and there’s a free plan.

items.q: Can we ask both sides of a deal?
items.a: Yes, with separate timing so asks feel appropriate to each party.
Private feedback helps you repair trust before public posts.

items.q: How is this different from Podium?
items.a: Same routing without brokerage enterprise pricing.
Pick moments after smooth move-ins or closings.
Follow your broker’s policies on incentives for reviews.

finalCta.heading: Start Getting More Real Estate Reviews Today
finalCta.subheading: Free forever. No credit card. Your first review request goes out in under 5 minutes.
